mapper.insert: INSERT INTO export_order ( request_date, worker_name, remark, status, stock_applied ) VALUES ( #{requestDate}, #{workerName}, #{remark}, #{status}, 'N' )

INSERT INTO export_order_detail ( export_order_id, product_type, model_name, color, hardness, base_qty, box_count, each_qty, total_qty, display_name, outbound_status ) VALUES ( #{exportOrderId}, #{type}, #{model}, #{color}, #{hardness}, #{baseQty}, #{boxCount}, #{eachQty}, #{totalQty}, #{displayName}, 'WAITING' )
mapper.select: SELECT id, request_date, worker_name, remark, status, stock_applied, created_at FROM export_order ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, request_date, worker_name, remark, status, stock_applied, created_at FROM export_order WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, export_order_id, product_type, model_name, color, hardness, base_qty, box_count, each_qty, total_qty, COALESCE(NULLIF(display_name, ''), model_name) AS display_name, created_at, outbound_status, outbound_at FROM export_order_detail WHERE export_order_id = #{exportOrderId} ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT id, request_date, worker_name, remark, status, stock_applied, created_at FROM export_order WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE export_order_detail SET outbound_status = 'DONE', outbound_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{detailId} AND outbound_status != 'DONE'
UPDATE export_order_detail SET outbound_status = 'WAITING', outbound_at = NULL WHERE export_order_id = #{exportOrderId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM export_order_detail WHERE export_order_id = #{exportOrderId} AND outbound_status = 'DONE'
SELECT * FROM export_order WHERE status = 'DONE' AND DATE_FORMAT(request_date, '%Y-%m') = #{month} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT DISTINCT DATE_FORMAT(request_date, '%Y-%m') FROM export_order WHERE status = 'DONE' AND request_date IS NOT NULL ORDER BY DATE_FORMAT(request_date, '%Y-%m') DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM export_order WHERE YEAR(created_at) = #{year} AND status != 'CANCELLED'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM export_order WHERE YEAR(created_at) = #{year} AND status = 'DONE'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM export_order WHERE status NOT IN ('DONE', 'CANCELLED') AND DATEDIFF(request_date, CURDATE()) = 2
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM export_order WHERE status NOT IN ('DONE', 'CANCELLED') AND DATEDIFF(request_date, CURDATE()) = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM export_order WHERE status NOT IN ('DONE', 'CANCELLED') AND DATEDIFF(request_date, CURDATE()) = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM export_order WHERE status NOT IN ('DONE', 'CANCELLED') AND DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), request_date) = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM export_order WHERE status NOT IN ('DONE', 'CANCELLED') AND DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), request_date) >= 2
SELECT id, request_date, worker_name, remark, status, stock_applied, created_at FROM export_order WHERE id = #{id}
